About

Container Heading

My name is Jose Estrada. This webpage is a project that showcases my portfolio and various projects I have worked on. This webpage uses GitHub pages, a GoDaddy SubDomain, Jekyll, HTML and CSS The project also utilizes github worflow for jekyll build, verification, and github page deployment.
